summary: Verified GLOBAL PWA safe area fix in Layout.js. All safe area CSS classes are correctly applied: safe-area-top on main content (Line 630), safe-area-bottom on mobile nav (Line 323) and main content for mobile (Line 630). OrderScreen bottom buttons (FACTURAR/PRE-CUENTA) are visible and not cut off.

tests.name: safe-area-bottom found in DOM
tests.details: Found on ASIDE (mobile-nav), MAIN, and DIV (3 elements)

tests.name: Mobile nav within viewport
tests.details: y=773.5, height=70.5, bottom=844 (exactly at viewport height)

tests.name: FACTURAR/PRE-CUENTA buttons visible
tests.details: Buttons visible above mobile nav, not cut off

global_safe_area_fix.details: Layout.js main content now has safe-area-top globally and safe-area-bottom for mobile. All screens inherit these safe areas automatically.

dashboard_safe_areas.details: Dashboard header respects safe-area-top from Layout.js main content

mesas_screen_safe_areas.details: Mesas screen inherits safe areas from Layout.js (safe-area-top=1, safe-area-bottom=2)

order_screen_bottom_buttons.details: FACTURAR and PRE-CUENTA buttons are visible and not cut off. Bottom buttons container has safe-area-bottom class.

context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA safe area GLOBAL fix verified in Layout.js. Key implementation: Line 630 has 'safe-area-top' always applied and 'safe-area-bottom' conditionally for mobile. Mobile nav (Line 323) also has safe-area-bottom. All screens now automatically inherit safe areas from Layout.js main container.
